options.name: The Forgotten
options.description: Died from exposure or abandonment — the slow cold death.

options.name: The Torn
options.description: Died from violence — murder, war, or brutal accident.

options.name: The Silent
options.description: Died from disease or quiet surrender.

options.name: The Prey
options.description: Died from terrible accident — hunted by fate.

options.name: The Stricken
options.description: Died by their own hand — suicide or sacrifice.

group2.label: Geist
group2.placeholder: Name and describe your Geist — the ghost of immense power bound to your soul.

powers.label: Manifestations
powers.description: Distribute 3 dots among Manifestations. Your Threshold grants affinity with two Manifestations. After assigning Manifestations, choose 3 Keys from the list below.

items.name: Boneyard
items.description: Dominion over a territory of death.

items.name: Caul
items.description: A shroud of death-energy enhancing physical form.

items.name: Curse
items.description: Laying misfortune and ill luck upon the living.

items.name: Fetter
items.description: Binding and anchoring — ghosts, memories, the living.

items.name: Marionette
items.description: Possessing and controlling animals, objects, the dead.

items.name: Oracle
items.description: Visions of the dead — reading echoes of death.

items.name: Shroud
items.description: Hiding from sight — invisible to the living and dead.

items.name: Torn
items.description: Tearing the barrier between life and death.

keys.label: Keys
keys.description: Choose 3 Keys. Keys modify how your Manifestations work.

items.name: Grave-Dirt Key
items.description: Manifestations channeled through earth and burial.

items.name: Phantasmal Key
items.description: Manifestations through illusion and the unreal.

items.name: Pyre-Flame Key
items.description: Manifestations wreathed in fire and light.

items.name: Stigmata Key
items.description: Manifestations channeled through blood and wounds.

items.name: Stillness Key
items.description: Manifestations of cold silence and cessation.
